steps.name: check-deps

steps.description: Create task folder structure and initial files.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: paper text already exhaustively reviewed in t0046's research_papers.md.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external information needed.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Identify placeBIP() x-coordinate convention, soma 3D access pattern, h.distance() origin requirements; review t0046's read_synapse_coords pattern.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the synapse-coordinate extraction wrapper and per-channel spatial-statistics analysis.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Extract synapse coordinates, compute per-channel spatial statistics, populate the answer asset.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: hypothesis-test design with explicit H1 verdict; no out-of-the-box analysis required.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results files; render per-channel x-coordinate histograms, radial-distance histograms, PD/ND count bar chart.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: this task IS the literature comparison; compare-literature would duplicate it.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions based on H1 verdict and any newly identified spatial-distribution discrepancies.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task.json completed, prepare PR.
